title: Zara's Colorful Feelings
synopsis: When Zara feels angry after her tower falls down, she learns that all feelings are okay and that Mama's love helps her feel better.

pages.text: Zara was building a tall tower with her blocks. Up, up, up it went! She was so proud of her colorful tower.

illustration.description: Zara with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes sits on the floor building a tower of colorful blocks. Happy yellow sunshine swirls around her in the background with warm golden light.
illustration.alt: Zara happily building a tower with blocks, surrounded by yellow sunshine colors

pages.text: CRASH! The tower fell down. All her blocks scattered everywhere. Zara felt something big and hot growing inside her chest.

illustration.description: Zara with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes looks upset as blocks are scattered around her. Angry red swirls begin to appear in the background, mixing with darker colors.
illustration.alt: Zara looking upset with fallen blocks around her and red swirls in the background

pages.text: The feeling grew bigger and bigger. Zara stomped her feet. She felt so mad! The angry feeling was like red fire all around her.

illustration.description: Zara with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes stomping her feet with an angry expression. Intense angry red swirls and flame-like patterns dominate the abstract background, visualizing her anger.
illustration.alt: Zara stomping angrily surrounded by red swirling anger patterns

pages.text: Then Zara started to cry. The angry red feeling changed to sad blue. It felt like rain clouds in her heart.

illustration.description: Zara with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes crying with tears on her cheeks. The background shows sad blue rain patterns and dark blue swirls replacing the red anger.
illustration.alt: Zara crying with blue rain and sad colors surrounding her

pages.text: Mama came over and sat down next to Zara. "I see you're feeling sad," Mama said softly. "That's okay. All feelings are okay."

illustration.description: Zara with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes sitting next to Mama who has similar features. The background shows blue sadness gradually mixing with gentle purple and pink comfort colors.
illustration.alt: Zara and Mama sitting together as sad blue colors mix with comforting purple

pages.text: Mama gave Zara a warm hug. "When we have big feelings, hugs can help," Mama said. Zara felt the sad blue feeling getting smaller.

illustration.description: Mama hugging Zara with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes. The background shows blue sadness fading away as warm pink and orange love colors spread around them.
illustration.alt: Mama and Zara hugging as blue sadness transforms to warm loving colors

pages.text: "Let's build a new tower together," Mama said. Zara smiled. The happy yellow sunshine feeling came back! All feelings come and go.

illustration.description: Zara with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes smiling while building blocks with Mama. Happy yellow sunshine patterns and bright cheerful colors fill the abstract background.
illustration.alt: Zara and Mama building together surrounded by happy yellow sunshine colors

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What was Zara building when it fell down?
questions.explanation: Zara was building a tall tower with her blocks that crashed down.

questions.question: What color was Zara's angry feeling?
questions.explanation: The angry feeling was described as red fire all around Zara.

questions.question: What did Mama say about feelings?
questions.explanation: Mama told Zara that all feelings are okay when she was sad.

questions.question: How did Mama help Zara feel better?
questions.explanation: Mama gave Zara a warm hug to help with her big feelings.
